productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Stripes Green Socks
description: It's comfort unparalleled once you slip into this pair of stockings from united colors of benetton. The cotton-polyester blend ensures that the stocking stays snug on your legs and protects you from the winter chill. Team it with a short skirt or suspenders for a sensual look.Stocking careMachine wash cold in not more than 30 degreesDo not dry cleanUse non-chlorine bleach if neededTumble dry lowDo not iron
